ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zipcodes" (
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zipcode */,
  "city" TEXT /* City associated with the zipcode */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the zipcode is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the zipcode is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the center of the zipcode */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the center of the zipcode */,
  "adultpop" INTEGER /* Number of adults living in the zipcode */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households in the zipcode */,
  "college" REAL /* Percentage of residents with a college degree */,
  "income" REAL /* Average household income in the zipcode */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the zipcode */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of residents in the zipcode */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median value of homes in the zipcode */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of residents living below the poverty line */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the adult population that is unemployed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode associated with the demographic data */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the demographic metric (e.g., population density, median age) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the demographic metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the demographic data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic" (
  "socioeconomic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic record */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode associated with the socioeconomic data */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the socioeconomic metric (e.g., median household income, poverty rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the socioeconomic metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the socioeconomic data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the socioeconomic data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the socioeconomic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socioeconomic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP request method (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "response_status" INTEGER /* HTTP response status code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
